resources.string: Review possible financial transactions detected from allowed app notifications.
A possible transaction of %1$s at %2$s was detected. Tap to review and add it.
A possible transaction of %1$s was detected. Tap to review and add it.
A possible transaction was detected. Tap to review and add it.
Open Gyst to review a pending suggestion.
Notification access lets Gyst inspect notifications only from the financial apps you allow and create reviewable transaction suggestions.
Notification permission lets Gyst tell you when a detected transaction is ready to review. Detection can still save suggestions when this permission is denied.
